name: PRINTMAXX Control Panel
tagline: 205K-line master dashboard at localhost:9999 — real-time feed of all agents, ventures, KPIs, P0 methods, and system health
description: Central command for the entire PRINTMAXX system. Flask web app serving at localhost:9999. Real-time feed showing agent status, venture health, Capital Genesis P0 methods, KPI executor results, deployment status, cron fleet health, and actionable queue. One dashboard to rule them all — Rule 6 says never create another one.
content_angles: 205K lines of Python — one of the largest single-file automation dashboards
Central command for 33 agents, 37 ventures, and 5,277 methods
